---
title: "neww"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
# ALL-DAYS MODEL SELECTION FOR THE 2012 SYNECHOCOCCUS DATA
#
# This script:
#   1. reads and cleans the full GitHub data,
#   2. finds every complete 24-hour period,
#   3. fits the instantaneous-light model for each period,
#   4. fits kernel models for several fixed tau_max values,
#   5. compares models using penalized SSQ,
#   6. saves progress and final CSV files,
#   7. creates summary plots.
#

# Start with RUN_ALL_DAYS <- FALSE to test the first 3 days.
# After that works, change it to TRUE.

rm(list = ls())

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(here)
library(ggplot2)


RUN_ALL_DAYS <- FALSE

# If TRUE, an interrupted all-days run will reuse the progress CSV
# and skip dates already completed.
RESUME_IF_PROGRESS_EXISTS <- TRUE

tau_candidates <- c(
  1,
  3,
  6,
  12,
  24,
  33
)

optimizer_maxit <- 1000

output_folder <- here(
  "all_days_model_results"
)

if (!dir.exists(output_folder)) {
  dir.create(
    output_folder,
    recursive = TRUE
  )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# READ THE THREE REAL-DATA FILES
# ------------------------------------------------------------

light_raw <- read_csv(
  here(
    "merged_fcb_data_2012",
    "E_data.csv"
  ),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

cells_raw <- read_csv(
  here(
    "merged_fcb_data_2012",
    "cells_size_dist_data.csv"
  ),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

volume_data <- read_csv(
  here(
    "merged_fcb_data_2012",
    "vol_bins.csv"
  ),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# CLEAN DATE-TIME COLUMNS
# ------------------------------------------------------------

light_raw <- light_raw |>
  mutate(
    date_time = parse_date_time(
      date_time,
      orders = c(
        "ymd HMS",
        "ymd HM",
        "ymd"
      ),
      tz = "UTC"
    )
  )

cells_raw <- cells_raw |>
  mutate(
    date_time = parse_date_time(
      date_time,
      orders = c(
        "ymd HMS",
        "ymd HM",
        "ymd"
      ),
      tz = "UTC"
    )
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# IDENTIFY SIZE-DISTRIBUTION COLUMNS
# ------------------------------------------------------------

size_columns <- grep(
  "^w[0-9]+$",
  names(cells_raw),
  value = TRUE
)

if (length(size_columns) != 57) {
  stop(
    "The cell data do not contain exactly 57 size columns."
  )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# REMOVE MISSING ROWS
# ------------------------------------------------------------

light_data <- light_raw |>
  filter(
    !is.na(date_time),
    !is.na(E)
  )

cell_data <- cells_raw |>
  filter(
    !is.na(date_time),
    !is.na(cells_per_ml),
    if_all(
      all_of(size_columns),
      ~ !is.na(.x)
    )
  )

v_i <- volume_data$v_i

if (length(v_i) != 57) {
  stop(
    "The volume file does not contain exactly 57 volume bins."
  )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# AVERAGE DUPLICATE TIMESTAMPS
# ------------------------------------------------------------

light_unique <- light_data |>
  group_by(date_time) |>
  summarise(
    E = mean(
      E,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(date_time)

cell_unique <- cell_data |>
  group_by(date_time) |>
  summarise(
    cells_per_ml = mean(
      cells_per_ml,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    across(
      all_of(size_columns),
      ~ mean(
        .x,
        na.rm = TRUE
      )
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(date_time)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# FIND COMPLETE 24-HOUR PERIODS
# ------------------------------------------------------------

maximum_tau <- max(
  tau_candidates
)

is_clean_period <- function(start_time) {
  
  expected_cell_times <- seq(
    from = start_time,
    by = "1 hour",
    length.out = 24
  )
  
  actual_cell_times <- cell_unique |>
    filter(
      date_time >= start_time,
      date_time <= start_time + hours(23)
    ) |>
    pull(date_time)
  
  cells_complete <-
    length(actual_cell_times) ==
    length(expected_cell_times) &&
    all(
      as.numeric(actual_cell_times) ==
        as.numeric(expected_cell_times)
    )
  
  expected_light_times <- seq(
    from = start_time - hours(maximum_tau),
    to = start_time + hours(24),
    by = "10 min"
  )
  
  actual_light_times <- light_unique |>
    filter(
      date_time >= start_time - hours(maximum_tau),
      date_time <= start_time + hours(24)
    ) |>
    pull(date_time)
  
  light_complete <-
    length(actual_light_times) ==
    length(expected_light_times) &&
    all(
      as.numeric(actual_light_times) ==
        as.numeric(expected_light_times)
    )
  
  return(
    cells_complete &&
      light_complete
  )
}

candidate_starts <- cell_unique |>
  filter(
    hour(date_time) == 6,
    minute(date_time) == 0,
    second(date_time) == 0
  ) |>
  pull(date_time)

clean_period_check <- vapply(
  seq_along(candidate_starts),
  function(i) {
    is_clean_period(
      candidate_starts[i]
    )
  },
  logical(1)
)

clean_starts <- candidate_starts[
  clean_period_check
]

cat(
  "\nNUMBER OF COMPLETE 24-HOUR PERIODS:",
  length(clean_starts),
  "\n"
)

if (length(clean_starts) == 0) {
  stop(
    "No complete 24-hour periods were found."
  )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# CHOOSE TEST MODE OR ALL-DAYS MODE
# ------------------------------------------------------------

if (RUN_ALL_DAYS) {
  
  days_to_run <- clean_starts
  
  cat(
    "\nRUNNING ALL COMPLETE PERIODS:",
    length(days_to_run),
    "days\n"
  )
  
} else {
  
  number_test_days <- min(
    3,
    length(clean_starts)
  )
  
  days_to_run <- clean_starts[
    seq_len(number_test_days)
  ]
  
  cat(
    "\nTEST MODE:",
    number_test_days,
    "days only\n"
  )
  
  cat(
    "After this works, change RUN_ALL_DAYS to TRUE.\n"
  )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# FIT ONE COMPLETE 24-HOUR PERIOD
# ------------------------------------------------------------

fit_one_day <- function(
    start_time,
    tau_candidates,
    optimizer_maxit
) {
  
  date_label <- as.Date(
    start_time,
    tz = "UTC"
  )
  
  cat(
    "\n==================================================\n"
  )
  
  cat(
    "STARTING DAY:",
    as.character(date_label),
    "\n"
  )
  
  cat(
    "==================================================\n"
  )
  
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  # PREPARE THIS DAY'S OBSERVED CELL DATA
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  
  cell_day <- cell_unique |>
    filter(
      date_time >= start_time,
      date_time <= start_time + hours(23)
    ) |>
    arrange(date_time)
  
  light_day <- light_unique |>
    filter(
      date_time >= start_time - hours(max(tau_candidates)),
      date_time <= start_time + hours(24)
    ) |>
    arrange(date_time)
  
  if (nrow(cell_day) != 24) {
    stop(
      paste(
        "The selected day does not have 24 cell observations:",
        date_label
      )
    )
  }
  
  W_observed <- as.matrix(
    cell_day[
      ,
      size_columns
    ]
  )
  
  W_observed <- W_observed /
    rowSums(W_observed)
  
  number_hours <- nrow(
    W_observed
  )
  
  number_sizes <- ncol(
    W_observed
  )
  
  n_independent <- (
    number_hours - 1
  ) * (
    number_sizes - 1
  )
  
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  # PREPARE THIS DAY'S MEASURED LIGHT
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  
  light_model <- light_day |>
    mutate(
      model_hour = as.numeric(
        difftime(
          date_time,
          start_time,
          units = "hours"
        )
      )
    ) |>
    arrange(model_hour)
  
  E_t <- function(t) {
    
    minimum_time <- min(
      light_model$model_hour
    )
    
    maximum_time <- max(
      light_model$model_hour
    )
    
    if (
      any(t < minimum_time) ||
      any(t > maximum_time)
    ) {
      stop(
        paste(
          "Light requested outside available range.",
          "Day:",
          date_label,
          "Requested:",
          paste(t, collapse = ", ")
        )
      )
    }
    
    light_value <- approx(
      x = light_model$model_hour,
      y = light_model$E,
      xout = t,
      method = "linear",
      rule = 1
    )$y
    
    return(
      pmax(
        light_value,
        0
      )
    )
  }
  
  kernel_weights <- function(
    p,
    tau_max
  ) {
    
    if (
      p <= 0 ||
      p >= 1
    ) {
      stop(
        "p must be strictly between 0 and 1."
      )
    }
    
    tau_values <- 0:tau_max
    
    weights <- p *
      (1 - p)^tau_values
    
    weights <- weights /
      sum(weights)
    
    return(
      weights
    )
  }
  
  E_kernel <- function(
    t,
    p,
    tau_max
  ) {
    
    tau_values <- 0:tau_max
    
    weights <- kernel_weights(
      p = p,
      tau_max = tau_max
    )
    
    past_light <- vapply(
      tau_values,
      function(tau) {
        E_t(
          t - tau
        )
      },
      numeric(1)
    )
    
    return(
      sum(
        weights *
          past_light
      )
    )
  }
  
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  # BIOLOGICAL MODEL
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  
  gamma_t <- function(
    t,
    gamma_max,
    E_star,
    model_type,
    p = NULL,
    tau_max = NULL
  ) {
    
    if (model_type == "instantaneous") {
      
      effective_light <- E_t(
        t
      )
      
    } else if (model_type == "kernel") {
      
      effective_light <- E_kernel(
        t = t,
        p = p,
        tau_max = tau_max
      )
      
    } else {
      
      stop(
        "Unknown model type."
      )
    }
    
    return(
      gamma_max *
        (
          1 -
            exp(
              -effective_light /
                E_star
            )
        )
    )
  }
  
  # Division is allowed at every time.
  # The old t < 6 restriction is not used.
  delta_i_t <- function(
    t,
    delta_max,
    a,
    b
  ) {
    
    return(
      delta_max *
        (
          (a * v_i)^b /
            (
              1 +
                (a * v_i)^b
            )
        )
    )
  }
  
  matrix_A <- function(
    t,
    gamma_max,
    delta_max,
    E_star,
    a,
    b,
    model_type,
    p = NULL,
    tau_max = NULL
  ) {
    
    A <- matrix(
      0,
      nrow = number_sizes,
      ncol = number_sizes
    )
    
    gamma <- gamma_t(
      t = t,
      gamma_max = gamma_max,
      E_star = E_star,
      model_type = model_type,
      p = p,
      tau_max = tau_max
    )
    
    delta_i <- delta_i_t(
      t = t,
      delta_max = delta_max,
      a = a,
      b = b
    )
    
    delta_v <- 0.125
    
    j <- as.integer(
      1 +
        1 / delta_v
    )
    
    # Growth
    for (i in 1:(number_sizes - 1)) {
      
      A[i + 1, i] <-
        A[i + 1, i] +
        gamma *
        (
          1 -
            delta_i[i]
        )
    }
    
    A[number_sizes, number_sizes] <-
      A[number_sizes, number_sizes] +
      gamma *
      (
        1 -
          delta_i[number_sizes]
      )
    
    # Division
    for (i in 2:(j - 1)) {
      
      A[1, i] <-
        A[1, i] +
        2 *
        delta_i[i]
    }
    
    for (i in j:number_sizes) {
      
      smaller_class <- i + 1 - j
      
      A[smaller_class, i] <-
        A[smaller_class, i] +
        2 *
        delta_i[i]
    }
    
    # Stasis
    A[1, 1] <-
      A[1, 1] +
      (
        1 -
          gamma
      ) *
      (
        1 -
          delta_i[1]
      ) +
      2 *
      delta_i[1]
    
    for (i in 2:(number_sizes - 1)) {
      
      A[i, i] <-
        A[i, i] +
        (
          1 -
            gamma
        ) *
        (
          1 -
            delta_i[i]
        )
    }
    
    A[number_sizes, number_sizes] <-
      A[number_sizes, number_sizes] +
      (
        1 -
          gamma
      ) *
      (
        1 -
          delta_i[number_sizes]
      )
    
    return(
      A
    )
  }
  
  matrix_B <- function(
    t,
    gamma_max,
    delta_max,
    E_star,
    a,
    b,
    model_type,
    p = NULL,
    tau_max = NULL,
    dt = 1 / 6
  ) {
    
    B <- diag(
      number_sizes
    )
    
    n_steps <- as.integer(
      round(
        1 / dt
      )
    )
    
    for (k in 0:(n_steps - 1)) {
      
      time_now <- t +
        k *
        dt
      
      A_k <- matrix_A(
        t = time_now,
        gamma_max = gamma_max,
        delta_max = delta_max,
        E_star = E_star,
        a = a,
        b = b,
        model_type = model_type,
        p = p,
        tau_max = tau_max
      )
      
      B <- A_k %*% B
    }
    
    return(
      B
    )
  }
  
  predict_size_distribution <- function(
    params,
    model_type,
    tau_max = NULL
  ) {
    
    gamma_max <- params[
      "gamma_max"
    ]
    
    delta_max <- params[
      "delta_max"
    ]
    
    E_star <- params[
      "E_star"
    ]
    
    a <- params[
      "a"
    ]
    
    b <- params[
      "b"
    ]
    
    if (model_type == "kernel") {
      
      p <- params[
        "p"
      ]
      
    } else {
      
      p <- NULL
    }
    
    W_predicted <- matrix(
      0,
      nrow = number_hours,
      ncol = number_sizes
    )
    
    W_predicted[1, ] <-
      W_observed[1, ]
    
    for (row in 1:(number_hours - 1)) {
      
      B_t <- matrix_B(
        t = row - 1,
        gamma_max = gamma_max,
        delta_max = delta_max,
        E_star = E_star,
        a = a,
        b = b,
        model_type = model_type,
        p = p,
        tau_max = tau_max
      )
      
      W_predicted[row + 1, ] <-
        B_t %*%
        W_predicted[row, ]
      
      total_predicted <- sum(
        W_predicted[row + 1, ]
      )
      
      if (
        !is.finite(total_predicted) ||
        total_predicted <= 0
      ) {
        stop(
          "Invalid projected distribution."
        )
      }
      
      W_predicted[row + 1, ] <-
        W_predicted[row + 1, ] /
        total_predicted
    }
    
    return(
      W_predicted
    )
  }
  
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  # INSTANTANEOUS MODEL FIT
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  
  instantaneous_names <- c(
    "gamma_max",
    "delta_max",
    "E_star",
    "a",
    "b"
  )
  
  instantaneous_start <- c(
    gamma_max = 0.20,
    delta_max = 0.03,
    E_star = 500,
    a = 2,
    b = 2
  )
  
  instantaneous_lower <- c(
    gamma_max = 0.001,
    delta_max = 0.001,
    E_star = 10,
    a = 0.1,
    b = 0.1
  )
  
  instantaneous_upper <- c(
    gamma_max = 0.5,
    delta_max = 0.15,
    E_star = 5000,
    a = 30,
    b = 10
  )
  
  instantaneous_objective <- function(x) {
    
    params <- setNames(
      as.numeric(x),
      instantaneous_names
    )
    
    result <- tryCatch({
      
      W_predicted <- predict_size_distribution(
        params = params,
        model_type = "instantaneous"
      )
      
      sse <- sum(
        (
          W_observed[-1, ] -
            W_predicted[-1, ]
        )^2
      )
      
      if (!is.finite(sse)) {
        return(1e10)
      }
      
      return(sse)
      
    }, error = function(e) {
      
      return(1e10)
      
    })
    
    return(result)
  }
  
  instantaneous_fit <- optim(
    par = unname(
      instantaneous_start
    ),
    fn = instantaneous_objective,
    method = "L-BFGS-B",
    lower = unname(
      instantaneous_lower
    ),
    upper = unname(
      instantaneous_upper
    ),
    control = list(
      maxit = optimizer_maxit,
      parscale = c(
        0.20,
        0.03,
        500,
        2,
        2
      )
    )
  )
  
  instantaneous_params <- setNames(
    instantaneous_fit$par,
    instantaneous_names
  )
  
  instantaneous_penalized <-
    instantaneous_fit$value /
    (
      n_independent -
        2 * 5
    )
  
  instantaneous_row <- data.frame(
    Date = date_label,
    Start_Time = as.character(
      start_time
    ),
    Model = "Instantaneous",
    tau_max = NA_real_,
    k = 5,
    gamma_max = unname(
      instantaneous_params[
        "gamma_max"
      ]
    ),
    delta_max = unname(
      instantaneous_params[
        "delta_max"
      ]
    ),
    E_star = unname(
      instantaneous_params[
        "E_star"
      ]
    ),
    a = unname(
      instantaneous_params[
        "a"
      ]
    ),
    b = unname(
      instantaneous_params[
        "b"
      ]
    ),
    p = NA_real_,
    SSE = instantaneous_fit$value,
    Penalized_SSQ_fixed_model =
      instantaneous_penalized,
    Convergence =
      instantaneous_fit$convergence,
    n_independent =
      n_independent,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  cat(
    "Instantaneous SSE:",
    instantaneous_fit$value,
    "\n"
  )
  
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  # KERNEL MODEL FITS
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  
  kernel_names <- c(
    "gamma_max",
    "delta_max",
    "E_star",
    "a",
    "b",
    "p"
  )
  
  kernel_start <- c(
    gamma_max = 0.20,
    delta_max = 0.03,
    E_star = 500,
    a = 2,
    b = 2,
    p = 0.90
  )
  
  kernel_lower <- c(
    gamma_max = 0.001,
    delta_max = 0.001,
    E_star = 10,
    a = 0.1,
    b = 0.1,
    p = 0.001
  )
  
  kernel_upper <- c(
    gamma_max = 0.5,
    delta_max = 0.15,
    E_star = 5000,
    a = 30,
    b = 10,
    p = 0.999
  )
  
  kernel_rows <- data.frame()
  
  for (tau_value in tau_candidates) {
    
    cat(
      "  Kernel tau_max =",
      tau_value,
      "\n"
    )
    
    kernel_objective <- function(x) {
      
      params <- setNames(
        as.numeric(x),
        kernel_names
      )
      
      result <- tryCatch({
        
        W_predicted <- predict_size_distribution(
          params = params,
          model_type = "kernel",
          tau_max = tau_value
        )
        
        sse <- sum(
          (
            W_observed[-1, ] -
              W_predicted[-1, ]
          )^2
        )
        
        if (!is.finite(sse)) {
          return(1e10)
        }
        
        return(sse)
        
      }, error = function(e) {
        
        return(1e10)
        
      })
      
      return(result)
    }
    
    starting_sse <- kernel_objective(
      unname(
        kernel_start
      )
    )
    
    if (
      !is.finite(starting_sse) ||
      starting_sse >= 1e10
    ) {
      
      kernel_rows <- bind_rows(
        kernel_rows,
        data.frame(
          Date = date_label,
          Start_Time = as.character(
            start_time
          ),
          Model = "Kernel",
          tau_max = tau_value,
          k = 6,
          gamma_max = NA_real_,
          delta_max = NA_real_,
          E_star = NA_real_,
          a = NA_real_,
          b = NA_real_,
          p = NA_real_,
          SSE = NA_real_,
          Penalized_SSQ_fixed_model =
            NA_real_,
          Convergence = 999,
          n_independent =
            n_independent,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      )
      
      next
    }
    
    kernel_fit <- optim(
      par = unname(
        kernel_start
      ),
      fn = kernel_objective,
      method = "L-BFGS-B",
      lower = unname(
        kernel_lower
      ),
      upper = unname(
        kernel_upper
      ),
      control = list(
        maxit = optimizer_maxit,
        parscale = c(
          0.20,
          0.03,
          500,
          2,
          2,
          0.50
        )
      )
    )
    
    kernel_params <- setNames(
      kernel_fit$par,
      kernel_names
    )
    
    kernel_penalized <-
      kernel_fit$value /
      (
        n_independent -
          2 * 6
      )
    
    kernel_rows <- bind_rows(
      kernel_rows,
      data.frame(
        Date = date_label,
        Start_Time = as.character(
          start_time
        ),
        Model = "Kernel",
        tau_max = tau_value,
        k = 6,
        gamma_max = unname(
          kernel_params[
            "gamma_max"
          ]
        ),
        delta_max = unname(
          kernel_params[
            "delta_max"
          ]
        ),
        E_star = unname(
          kernel_params[
            "E_star"
          ]
        ),
        a = unname(
          kernel_params[
            "a"
          ]
        ),
        b = unname(
          kernel_params[
            "b"
          ]
        ),
        p = unname(
          kernel_params[
            "p"
          ]
        ),
        SSE = kernel_fit$value,
        Penalized_SSQ_fixed_model =
          kernel_penalized,
        Convergence =
          kernel_fit$convergence,
        n_independent =
          n_independent,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    )
  }
  
  all_rows <- bind_rows(
    instantaneous_row,
    kernel_rows
  )
  
  return(
    all_rows
  )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# RUN THE SELECTED DAYS
# ------------------------------------------------------------

progress_results_file <- file.path(
  output_folder,
  "all_model_results_progress.csv"
)

progress_failed_file <- file.path(
  output_folder,
  "failed_days_progress.csv"
)

all_model_results <- data.frame()
failed_days <- data.frame()

if (
  RESUME_IF_PROGRESS_EXISTS &&
  file.exists(progress_results_file)
) {
  
  all_model_results <- read_csv(
    progress_results_file,
    show_col_types = FALSE
  )
  
  cat(
    "\nRESUMING FROM EXISTING PROGRESS FILE.\n"
  )
}

if (
  RESUME_IF_PROGRESS_EXISTS &&
  file.exists(progress_failed_file)
) {
  
  failed_days <- read_csv(
    progress_failed_file,
    show_col_types = FALSE
  )
}

completed_dates <- unique(
  as.Date(
    all_model_results$Date
  )
)

remaining_days <- days_to_run[
  !as.Date(days_to_run) %in%
    completed_dates
]

cat(
  "\nDAYS ALREADY COMPLETED:",
  length(completed_dates),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "DAYS LEFT TO RUN:",
  length(remaining_days),
  "\n"
)

for (day_index in seq_along(remaining_days)) {
  
  current_start <- remaining_days[
    day_index
  ]
  
  day_result <- tryCatch(
    
    fit_one_day(
      start_time = current_start,
      tau_candidates = tau_candidates,
      optimizer_maxit = optimizer_maxit
    ),
    
    error = function(e) {
      
      failed_days <<- bind_rows(
        failed_days,
        data.frame(
          Start_Time =
            as.character(
              current_start
            ),
          Error =
            conditionMessage(e),
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      )
      
      return(NULL)
    }
  )
  
  if (!is.null(day_result)) {
    
    all_model_results <- bind_rows(
      all_model_results,
      day_result
    )
  }
  
  write_csv(
    all_model_results,
    file.path(
      output_folder,
      "all_model_results_progress.csv"
    )
  )
  
  write_csv(
    failed_days,
    file.path(
      output_folder,
      "failed_days_progress.csv"
    )
  )
  
  cat(
    "\nFINISHED",
    day_index,
    "OF",
    length(remaining_days),
    "REMAINING DAYS\n"
  )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# SAVE ALL FITTED MODEL RESULTS
# ------------------------------------------------------------

write_csv(
  all_model_results,
  file.path(
    output_folder,
    "all_model_results.csv"
  )
)

write_csv(
  failed_days,
  file.path(
    output_folder,
    "failed_days.csv"
  )
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# BUILD ONE SUMMARY ROW PER DAY
# ------------------------------------------------------------

instantaneous_daily <- all_model_results |>
  filter(
    Model == "Instantaneous"
  ) |>
  transmute(
    Date,
    Instantaneous_SSE = SSE,
    Instantaneous_Penalized_k5 =
      Penalized_SSQ_fixed_model,
    Instantaneous_Convergence =
      Convergence
  )

best_kernel_daily <- all_model_results |>
  filter(
    Model == "Kernel",
    is.finite(SSE)
  ) |>
  group_by(Date) |>
  slice_min(
    order_by = SSE,
    n = 1,
    with_ties = FALSE
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  transmute(
    Date,
    Best_tau_max = tau_max,
    Best_p = p,
    Best_Kernel_SSE = SSE,
    Best_Kernel_Penalized_k6 =
      Penalized_SSQ_fixed_model,
    n_independent,
    Best_Kernel_Convergence =
      Convergence
  ) |>
  mutate(
    # Because tau_max was selected from the data,
    # this version counts it as an additional parameter.
    Best_Kernel_Penalized_k7 =
      Best_Kernel_SSE /
      (
        n_independent -
          2 * 7
      )
  )

daily_model_summary <- instantaneous_daily |>
  left_join(
    best_kernel_daily,
    by = "Date"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    Preferred_Model_k7 =
      case_when(
        is.na(
          Best_Kernel_Penalized_k7
        ) ~ "Instantaneous",
        Instantaneous_Penalized_k5 <=
          Best_Kernel_Penalized_k7 ~
          "Instantaneous",
        TRUE ~ "Kernel"
      ),
    Penalized_Difference =
      Best_Kernel_Penalized_k7 -
      Instantaneous_Penalized_k5
  )

write_csv(
  daily_model_summary,
  file.path(
    output_folder,
    "daily_model_summary.csv"
  )
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# OVERALL SUMMARY
# ------------------------------------------------------------

preference_counts <- daily_model_summary |>
  count(
    Preferred_Model_k7,
    name = "Number_of_Days"
  )

write_csv(
  preference_counts,
  file.path(
    output_folder,
    "preferred_model_counts.csv"
  )
)

cat(
  "\nFINAL PREFERRED-MODEL COUNTS\n"
)

print(
  preference_counts
)

cat(
  "\nFIRST DAILY SUMMARY ROWS\n"
)

print(
  head(
    daily_model_summary
  )
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# SUMMARY PLOTS
# ------------------------------------------------------------

preference_plot <- ggplot(
  preference_counts,
  aes(
    x = Preferred_Model_k7,
    y = Number_of_Days
  )
) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(
    title =
      "Preferred Model Across Complete 24-Hour Periods",
    x =
      "Preferred model",
    y =
      "Number of periods"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(
    base_size = 13
  )

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(
    output_folder,
    "preferred_model_counts.png"
  ),
  plot = preference_plot,
  width = 7,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)

p_plot <- ggplot(
  daily_model_summary,
  aes(
    x = Date,
    y = Best_p
  )
) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title =
      "Estimated Kernel Memory Parameter Across Days",
    x =
      "Date",
    y =
      "Best fitted p"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(
    base_size = 13
  )

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(
    output_folder,
    "best_p_by_date.png"
  ),
  plot = p_plot,
  width = 9,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)

tau_plot <- ggplot(
  daily_model_summary,
  aes(
    x = Date,
    y = Best_tau_max
  )
) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title =
      "Selected Kernel Memory Length Across Days",
    x =
      "Date",
    y =
      expression(
        tau[max]
      )
  ) +
  theme_minimal(
    base_size = 13
  )

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(
    output_folder,
    "best_tau_by_date.png"
  ),
  plot = tau_plot,
  width = 9,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)

difference_plot <- ggplot(
  daily_model_summary,
  aes(
    x = Date,
    y = Penalized_Difference
  )
) +
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = 0,
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title =
      "Kernel Minus Instantaneous Penalized SSQ",
    subtitle =
      "Positive values favor the instantaneous model; negative values favor the kernel model",
    x =
      "Date",
    y =
      "Penalized SSQ difference"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(
    base_size = 13
  )

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(
    output_folder,
    "penalized_ssq_difference_by_date.png"
  ),
  plot = difference_plot,
  width = 9,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)

cat(
  "\nANALYSIS FINISHED.\n"
)

cat(
  "Results were saved in:\n",
  output_folder,
  "\n"
)

```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
